info.name: AI Product Manager Copilot
info.description: Postman collection for the AI Product Manager Copilot FastAPI backend, containing all feedback, planning, integration, QA, and lifecycle endpoints.

request.description: Retrieve connection status, version info, and check which integrations are active.
Verifies that the configured Gemini or Groq API credentials are valid and responding.
Ingests customer feedback logs and clusters them into urgency, sentiment, and themes.
Generates a complete Product Requirement Document (PRD) from ideas and constraints.
Scans the codebase and assesses PRD implementation feasibility, risks, and effort hours.
Decomposes a PRD and feasibility report into structured sprint tickets.
Exports a PRD markdown document to a page in your Notion workspace.
Pushes the sprint backlog tickets to Jira Cloud (runs in Dry-Run mode if credentials are missing).
Pushes the sprint backlog tickets to Linear (runs in Dry-Run mode if credentials are missing).
Sends a sprint kickoff summary block layout to a Slack channel webhook.
Creates a remote Git task branch on GitHub or GitLab.
Audits a pull request's file modifications against a ticket's Acceptance Criteria.
Queries the codebase structure and compares implementations against PRD launch specifications.
Transforms a legacy PRD and codebase references into a fully upgraded v2.0 specification and changelog.
